title: Nuclei Isolation for SNARE-seq2
author: Carter Palmer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8tvhwn6

steps.title: Nuclei Extraction Buffer (NEB)
steps.instruction: Nuclei Extraction Buffer (NEB): %s %s

steps.title: Remove tissue from -80 o C...
steps.instruction: Remove tissue from -80 o C storage and place on ice.

steps.title: Image the tissue rapidly in front of a ruler
steps.instruction: Image the tissue rapidly in front of a ruler

steps.title: Add 1ml of ice cold NEB...
steps.instruction: Add 1ml of ice cold NEB to the tissue and incubate on ice for 00:15:00

steps.title: During the incubation, wash the homogenizer...
steps.instruction: During the incubation, wash the homogenizer with MilliQ water, 10% bleach, 70% EtOH, and MilliQ water again

steps.title: Rinse homogenizer with 1ml of ice cold NEB
steps.instruction: Rinse homogenizer with 1ml of ice cold NEB

steps.title: Once the incubation is complete, add...
steps.instruction: Once the incubation is complete, add 1 ml of fresh NEB to the homogenizer and transfer the tissue and the 1ml of NEB it is in to the homogenizer

steps.title: Homogenize the tissue using ~20 compressions...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the tissue using ~20 compressions with the pestle, or until the tissue is entirely dissociated, this step can be variable

steps.title: Pass nuclei suspension through 50 micron...
steps.instruction: Pass nuclei suspension through 50 micron filter into a 15 ml conical tube, wash filter with another 4ml of NEB

steps.title: Wait for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Wait for 00:05:00

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Carefully aspirate the supernatant and slowly...
steps.instruction: Carefully aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend the pellet in 1ml of NEB

steps.title: Gently add another 9 ml of NEB to the sample
steps.instruction: Gently add another 9 ml of NEB to the sample

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend...
steps.instruction: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend the samples in 1ml of PBSE + Sucrose

steps.title: Gently add another 5 ml of PBSE + Sucrose
steps.instruction: Gently add another 5 ml of PBSE + Sucrose

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min

steps.title: PBSE + Sucrose
steps.instruction: PBSE + Sucrose: %s %s

steps.title: PBSE + BSA
steps.instruction: PBSE + BSA: %s %s

steps.title: Aspirate all but approximately 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Aspirate all but approximately 100 µL of the PBSE+Sucrose, and gently resuspend the nuclei pellet in the remaining volume

steps.title: While gently vortexing, add 5ml of 0
steps.instruction: While gently vortexing, add 5ml of 0.5% Formaldehyde diluted in 1X PBS

steps.title: Fix for 10 min on ice
steps.instruction: Fix for 10 min on ice

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend...
steps.instruction: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend the samples in 1ml of PBSE + Sucrose

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend...
steps.instruction: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend the samples in 1ml of PBSE + BSA

steps.title: Gently add another 10ml of PBSE + BSA
steps.instruction: Gently add another 10ml of PBSE + BSA

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples 820 x g, 5 min

steps.title: Make 1ml/sample of PBSE + BSA...
steps.instruction: Make 1ml/sample of PBSE + BSA + DAPI by adding DAPI at a final concentration of 1.25 µg/ml to PBSE + BSA. This is a 1:4000 dilution from a DAPI stock at 5mg/ml

steps.title: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend...
steps.instruction: Aspirate the supernatant and slowly resuspend the samples in 1ml of PBSE + BSA + DAPI

steps.title: Pass nuclei suspension through 50 micron...
steps.instruction: Pass nuclei suspension through 50 micron filter into a FACS tube, gently tap on table to get all nuclei through the filter

steps.title: Use the DAPI singlet peak to...
steps.instruction: Use the DAPI singlet peak to sort singlet nuclei events into a 2ml low binding eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Store all samples on ice until SNARE-seq processing begins
steps.instruction: Store all samples on ice until SNARE-seq processing begins. Do not store for longer 4 hours before processing.
